title: Cute Netherite
description: Turns ancient debris into pink ancient debris!
body:
Cute Netherite is a resource pack that changes the Ancient Debris block into a cuter glowing model, making it easier to spot and mine in the Nether. It also replaces the Netherite Scrap texture with a pink variant.

Attention! To make the Ancient Debris texture glow, use the Continuity mod or OptiFine!
